title: Senior Software Engineer - Paytm - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Paytm - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Paytm in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Paytm:
Paytm is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm!
